markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Arena.im's marketing performance, conversion rate optimization efforts, and strategize on improving sign-ups and content effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Arena.im is experiencing increased impressions but no corresponding increase in sign-ups (still 5-10 per day)](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Team is shifting focus to conversion rate optimization (CRO) and improving content quality](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide more strategic support in content enrichment and CRO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Need to better understand traffic quality and user journey to improve conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Marketing Team Changes

  - [PA is no longer leading marketing; Paulo Martins taking over](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Kyle Gaudreau introduced as new GrowthX team member with CRO expertise](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Best week yet for clicks (144) and third-best for impressions (9,000+)](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [125 articles published, 120 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Discrepancy noted between Google Search Console and Looker Studio data](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Efforts

  - [Implementing widgets and in-content CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Adding promotional offers (e.g., 3 months free)](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Considering more strategic placement of CTAs and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Team cautioned about expecting significant lift from end-of-article CTAs alone](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Proposing to reprioritize content production:](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
    1.  Focus on enriching top-performing content
    2.  Create authoritative pillar content
    3.  Develop content that can be repurposed (e.g., infographics, lead magnets)
  - [Andrej to work on internal linking strategy for top 20 performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)

### Traffic and Sign-up Analysis

  - [Need to correlate increased impressions/clicks with actual website traffic](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Aim to understand if traffic is convertible and identify improvement areas](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Kyle suggested separating blog traffic analysis to establish a baseline conversion rate](https://fathom.video/share/pNyKox9GMExZ4MJTK3rY9qzaz6hzUyh3?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Next Steps

1.  Kyle and Paulo to have a deep-dive session on Arena.im's context, product, and PLG strategy
2.  GrowthX team to review and brainstorm CRO ideas early next week
3.  Develop a roadmap for pillar content and content enrichment strategy
4.  Andrej to implement internal linking strategy for top-performing articles
5.  Continue monitoring CRO efforts and their impact on sign-ups
6.  GrowthX team to analyze Google Analytics data for deeper insights
7.  Consider refining messaging based on recent ICP and bundling changes
